title: PEARL Awards Nigeria Inaugurates 2026 Central Working Committee
description: The President/CEO of PEARL Awards Nigeria, Mr. Tayo Orekoya, has inaugurated the 2026 Central Working Committee, charging them to deliver exceptional events that surpass previous editions.  “We
html:
The President/CEO of PEARL Awards Nigeria, Mr. Tayo Orekoya, has inaugurated the 2026 Central Working Committee, charging them to deliver exceptional events that surpass previous editions.
 “We are poised to deliver an edition that not only meets but exceeds expectations” – Tayo Orekoya
The committee is set to oversee the 2026 PEARL Awards Corporate Summit and Awards Nite. Orekoya expressed confidence in the committee’s ability to deliver, citing their experience and professionalism.
Orekoya noted that “following the resounding success of our 30th Anniversary celebrations, it has become imperative for the Awards Project to continually reposition itself for enhanced service delivery and deeper contributions to the growth and development of the Nigerian Capital Market and the nation’s economy at large”.
Consequently, the Committee’s composition is as follows:
Mr. Olisemeka Obi                  –           Chairman
Mrs. Yemisi Lanre-Idowu       –           Vice Chairman (Strategy)
Mr. Elijah John                         –           Vice Chairman (Sales & Marketing)
Mr. Lekan Adekoya                  –           Member/ Board Secretary
Mr. Sam Emehelu                    –           Special Adviser (New Media & Publicity)
Mr. Vincent Chukwuka           –           Special Adviser (Creativity & Innovation)
Mr. Philip Braide                      –        Special Adviser (Contents Management & Publication)
Mr. Boason Omofaye              –           Special Adviser (PEARL Awards Africa)
Mr. Tosin Olagoroye                –           Secretary, CWC
Mr. Festus Odume                    –          Member
Mr. Nurudeen Olayode            –          Member
Mr. Niyi Makinde                     –          Member
Mr. Teslim Shitta-Bey              –          Member
Mr. Olise Ebo                             –          Member
Mrs. Lilian Imoni-Oladipo          –        Member
Mr. Ime Edet                                 –        Member
Mr. Adeleke Ajibola                     –        Member
“I want to express our profound appreciation to the immediate past Central Working Committee, particularly the immediate past Chairman, Mr. Sam Emehelu, the Vice Chairmen, the Special Adviser, and the entire membership, for their remarkable dedication and commitment”.
Orekoya stressed that their collective efforts culminated in the successful hosting of the 30th Anniversary Corporate Summit, the publication of Winning Strategies of Nigeria’s Corporate Giants, the 2026 Nigerian Stock Market Annual, and the landmark 30th Anniversary PEARL Awards Nite.
These achievements according to him, have further strengthened the credibility and stature of the PEARL Awards brand.
“I wish to specially acknowledge the invaluable roles played by the Board Secretary, Mr. Lekan Adekoya, and the erstwhile Project Manager, Mr. Olisemeka Obi, for their effective coordination and administrative leadership at the Secretariat”.
“Distinguished Ladies and Gentlemen, we appreciate your presence here today despite your demanding schedules. Your willingness to serve underscores your commitment to the advancement of the Nigerian Capital Market and the continued success of the PEARL Awards Project. We look forward to your dedication as we embark on the important tasks ahead”.
Photo Caption: L-R: Sam Emehelu,              Special Adviser, President/CEO of PEARL Awards Nigeria, Tayo Orekoya, Olisemeka Obi , Chairman (CWC) and Lekan Adekoya  Board Secretary at the inauguration of the 2026 Central Working Committee in Lagos.
